description: Model must call the CRM contact lookup tool using an email address extracted from a natural-language request. Tests correct tool selection and email extraction with no ambiguity in the prompt.
prompt: Look up the CRM record for the contact with email address jordan.elliot@example.com. Use the available tool.

toolDefinitions.name: lookup_contact
toolDefinitions.description: Searches the CRM for a contact record by email address and returns their profile.

email.description: The contact's email address in standard format, e.g. 'user@domain.com'.
